title: b8533
description: imatrix : fix crash when using --show-statistics with zero counts ( #19532 ) imatrix: fix crash when using --show-statistics with zero counts Fixes division by zero that caused floating point exceptions when processing imatrix files with zero count values. Added checks to skip zero counts and handle empty activation vectors. title: b8532
description: CUDA & CPU: support F32 kernel type for CONV_TRANSPOSE_2D ( #17094 ) Refactor CUDA 2D transpose implementation to support multiple kernel types and improve parameter handling Introduced a conv2d_transpose_params struct for better parameter management. Updated conv2d_transpose_kernel to be templated for different kernel types (float and half). Modified ggml_cuda_conv_2d_transpose_p0 to handle both F16 and F32 kernel types.
